title: Schleichi's Mods
description: Modpack created by schleichi aimed for technical Minecraft players. Performance meets usability.
body:
# Schleichi's Mods _Sick of Minecraft running slow, looking plain, or feeling weird to play?_ That's exactly why we made this modpack. This pack brings together **good performance**, **building help**, and **quality-of-life** mods ALL in one place, put together by multiple expert Technical Minecraft players to create the best all-in-one Modpack. ## Features
📈 **Performance** - higher FPS, faster loading, and smoother gameplay even in large and complex worlds
🖼️ **Visuals** - lighting, shadows, connected textures, and improved rendering - while still respecting Minecraft’s vanilla aesthetics
🏗️ **Building** - blueprint systems, placement helpers, and large-scale editing tools similar to Paint allow you to construct complex and ginormous builds faster and better
⚙️ **Technical Play** - this pack includes the tools you need to test and push redstone contraptions to your maximum level
🌟 **Quality Of Life** - menus are cleaner, inventory handling is smarter
🤖 **Control your game** - spawn bots to load chunks or fulfill tasks - for technical players who love control.
## About some Mods
Some mods in this modpack are pretty complex and learny. If you want to truly experience the more "technical" side of this modpack, feel free to take a look at these hand-picked YouTube videos about these mods: **Axiom** - Become a master at building: (1h 51m) **Carpet** - Control your world with bots: (54m) **Litematica** - Build your favourite farms with blueprints: (9m) **Item Scroller** - Craft and move around items like a king: (10m) **Tweakeroo** - The most versatile quality-of-life mod of all time: (17m) **Client Commands** - Useful commands to speed up your gaming process > [Github](https://github.com/Earthcomputer/clientcommands/wiki) (by earthcomputer)
_Modpacks put together by Schleichi and/or SchleichiSMP_
